The '''''Equity''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the ''Equity'' was part of a task force of warships dispatched to capture the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']], commanded by the renegade [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Gaen Drommel]].<ref name="TfO" />

The commander of the ''Equity'' was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Volahn]], who accepted the surrender of Drommel's second-in-command, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Gastos Niovi|Niovi]], who assassinated his superior after the warlord lost his mind.<ref name="TfO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*{{JournalCite|15|Two for One}} {{1st}}
